name: Zhang Fei

skills.name: Dark Potential
skills.description:
Human Form: Basic Attack and skill hits grant Madness.
Ferali Form: Using the skill reduces the Movement Speed of enemies within range.

skills.name: Forbidden Domain
skills.description:
Deals damage to enemies within range.
Knocks back enemy heroes.

skills.name: Leaping Savior
skills.description:
Leaps to the target location, granting shields to nearby teammates.
Gains Madness for each shield granted.

skills.name: Unbridled Outburst
skills.description:
Roars and transforms. After a short period of invincibility and immunity to crowd control, gains a shield.
The roar creates a wind that damages, knocks back, and stuns enemies.
Gains Movement Speed while in the wind zone.

skillsZh.name: 黑暗潛能
skillsZh.description:
人類形態：普攻和技能命中可獲得狂意值。
魔種形態：施放技能會降低自身周圍一定範圍內的敵人的移動速度。

skillsZh.name: 畫地為牢
skillsZh.description:
對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害。
對敵方英雄附加擊退效果。

skillsZh.name: 守護機關
skillsZh.description:
向指定位置跳躍，為附近友方英雄增加護盾值。
每為一名友方英雄提供護盾值，張飛會獲得額外狂意值。

skillsZh.name: 狂獸血性
skillsZh.description:
怒吼變身，短暫無敵，霸體後獲得護盾。
怒吼形成狂風，對敵人造成傷害、擊退和暈眩效果。
張飛在狂風中會增加移動速度。

tips: Zhang Fei (Tank): Tier S — 50% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Frigid Charge, Overlord's Platemail, Glacial Buckler.
tipsZh: 張飛（遊走）：梯度 S，勝率 50%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：冰霜衝擊、霸者重裝、極寒風暴.

patchHistory.change: Added a launch effect to his Skill 1 and Skill 2 while he is transformed by his Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: We wanted to make his skills better match his massive body

patchHistoryZh.change: 變身後的一技能二技能新增擊飛效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 讓變身後的技能更配合他龐大的身軀

faqs.question: Is Zhang Fei good in current season?
faqs.answer: Zhang Fei is Tier S Tank with 50% win rate, 1.11% pick rate, and 0.36% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Zhang Fei build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Frigid Charge, Overlord's Platemail, Glacial Buckler, Sage's Sanctuary, Longnight Guardian, Blazing Cape.

faqs.question: How to counter Zhang Fei?
faqs.answer: Pick Diaochan, Wukong, Musashi. Strong into Arli, Consort Yu, Marco Polo.

faqsZh.question: 張飛 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 張飛 為 S 梯度，勝率 50%、選取 1.11%、禁用 0.36%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 張飛 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：冰霜衝擊、霸者重裝、極寒風暴、賢者的庇護、永夜守護、紅蓮斗篷.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 張飛？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Diaochan、Wukong、Musashi。張飛 克制 Arli、Consort Yu、Marco Polo。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Arli, Consort Yu, Marco Polo. Weak into: Diaochan, Wukong, Musashi.

guide.overview: Zhang Fei is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.1% win rate and 1.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Zhang Fei: Human Form: Hits from Basic Attacks and skills grant madness.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Blazing Cape, Ominous Premonition, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Zhang Fei's Tank kit. Take Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Forbidden Domain → Leaping Savior → Unbridled Outburst → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Unbridled Outburst (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Forbidden Domain, and Unbridled Outburst on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Forbidden Domain → Leaping Savior → Unbridled Outburst → weave basic attacks

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Zhang Fei is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.2% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Zhang Fei.
comparisons: Zhang Fei vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 1.3% more often globally. Choose Zhang Fei when you need Roaming identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Zhang Fei vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 2.2% more often globally. Choose Zhang Fei when you need Roaming identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Zhang Fei excels into Arli, Consort Yu, Marco Polo. Avoid blind picking into Diaochan, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.
